descriptionKey.french: Réduit la [capacity] de [effect0.power] et déclenche [gorge] lors d'une [resolve].
descriptionKey.german: Verringert [capacity] um [effect0.power] und l\xF6st [gorge] beim [resolve] aus.
descriptionKey.portuguese: Reduz a [capacity] em [effect0.power] e aciona [gorge] ao usar [resolve].
descriptionKey.chinese: 触发 [resolve] 时，使 [capacity] 减少 [effect0.power] 并触发 [gorge]。
descriptionKey.spanish: Reduce la [capacity] en [effect0.power] y activa [gorge] al activar [resolve].
descriptionKey.japanese: [resolve]時に[capacity]を[effect0.power]減少させ、[gorge]を発動する。
